home.missionText: SANTIBENE's mission is to think of ways to solve tomorrow's challenges today. We strive to remain a reference in our market, excelling in innovation, solidity and efficiency of the services offered.
home.visionText: We are passionate about what we do. Our clients are like the beating of our heart. It is for them that we always seek excellence, maintaining team spirit and the rigor of our workforce.
home.valuesText: Our values are grounded in ethics, transparency and the commitment of the Group.
home.aboutText: SANTIBENE is a young, dynamic and versatile company that seeks to meet the needs of its clients. It operates in the market as the procurement department of its clients, always looking for the best solutions at the best price. We have logistic conditions that allow us to carry out all storage and distribution of orders, optimizing air and containerized transport to the maximum.
home.portfolioTitle: Our portfolio includes services such as:
home.serviceAlimentarText: Complete solutions in the food area: supply, catering, consulting and meal production with quality, customization and convenience.
home.serviceConstrucaoText: Complete services in construction, equipment and projects: quality, efficiency and customized solutions for every need.
home.serviceFarmaceuticaText: With presence in Angola, we market the main brands of medicines, equipment and consumables in the healthcare area.
home.serviceITText: Secure and confidential IT solutions: supply, maintenance and disposal of equipment with total privacy and convenience.
home.serviceOfficeText: We market a wide range of consumables and offer turnkey solutions for outfitting office rooms.
home.allInOneText: All so you don't have to worry about looking for services elsewhere
home.budgetText: Need a budget? Talk to us!
home.brandsText: With the help of our partners, we overcome our limits and provide better quality services for you

sobre.title: About Us
sobre.companyText: SANTIBENE is a young, dynamic and versatile company that seeks to meet the needs of its clients. It operates in the market as the procurement department of its clients, always looking for the best solutions at the best price. We have logistic conditions that allow us to carry out all storage and distribution of orders, optimizing air and containerized transport to the maximum.
sobre.missionText: SANTIBENE's mission is to think of ways to solve tomorrow's challenges today. We strive to remain a reference in our market, excelling in innovation, solidity and efficiency of the services offered.
sobre.visionText: We are passionate about what we do. Our clients are like the beating of our heart. It is for them that we always seek excellence, maintaining team spirit and the rigor of our workforce.
sobre.valuesText: Our values are grounded in ethics, transparency and the commitment of the Group.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.locationLine1: Av. Engenheiro e Oliveira, nº 3, B/C 1900-221, Portugal
contacto.locationLine2: Ed. Santa Marta, Rua Major Marcelino Dias Nº 18 Maculusso - Angola
contacto.contactText: If you have any questions, doubts or suggestions, don't hesitate to contact us!

logistica.title: Logistics
logistica.subtitle: Air, Sea and Land
logistica.paragraph1: Santibene Comércio e Serviços is a company specialized in import and export of products, with a strong presence in the national and international market.
logistica.paragraph2: We operate with excellence in international logistics, offering complete solutions for the transportation of goods by sea, air and land, ensuring agility, safety and efficiency in all stages of the process.
logistica.paragraph3: Our commitment is to connect markets, shorten distances and deliver results with quality and responsibility, always respecting the norms and requirements of each country.
logistica.paragraph4: With a highly trained team and strategic partners around the world, Santibene positions itself as a reliable and versatile company to meet the demands of foreign trade, regardless of the segment.
logistica.slogan: Santibene. Connecting the world to your business.
logistica.knowMore: Would you like to know more?

areaAlimentar.title: Food
areaAlimentar.subtitle: Food
areaAlimentar.foodSupplyText: Distribution of fresh, frozen or dry products, focusing on quality and origin.
areaAlimentar.cateringText: Food services for events, with personalized menus and on-site setup.
areaAlimentar.nutritionConsultingText: Preparation of balanced menus, dietary planning and team training.
areaAlimentar.mealProductionText: Industrial kitchen for companies, schools or hospitals, with rigorous hygiene and nutrition control.
areaAlimentar.qualityText: Selected foods prepared with rigorous standards
areaAlimentar.convenienceText: Complete services from supply to execution

areaConstrucao.title: Construction, Projects & Equipment
areaConstrucao.subtitle: Construction, Projects & Equipment
areaConstrucao.constructionText: Buildings, renovations and infrastructure, with professional execution and deadline compliance.
areaConstrucao.equipmentSupplyText: High quality machinery, tools and construction materials.
areaConstrucao.projectManagementText: Planning, execution and supervision of works, ensuring efficiency and compliance with standards.
areaConstrucao.technicalConsultingText: Feasibility analysis, customized projects and tailor-made solutions for each need.
areaConstrucao.efficiencyText: Professional management to meet deadlines and budgets

areaFarmaceutica.title: Pharmaceutical & Hospital Supplies
areaFarmaceutica.subtitle: Pharmaceutical & Hospital Supplies
areaFarmaceutica.text: With presence in Angola, we market the main brands of medicines, equipment and consumables in the healthcare area.

areaIT.title: IT Consumables & Equipment
areaIT.subtitle: IT Consumables & Equipment
areaIT.consumablesText: Cartridges, toners, paper, batteries and accessories, with discreet deliveries and neutral packaging.
areaIT.equipmentText: Computers, printers, monitors and peripherals, with confidential transactions and private deliveries.
areaIT.maintenanceText: Repairs, updates and data recovery, carried out with total confidentiality.
areaIT.disposalText: Collection and destruction of sensitive equipment and data, with confidential certificate.
areaIT.consultingText: Needs analysis and infrastructure planning, with private meetings and protected documentation.
areaIT.privacyText: Transactions and services carried out confidentially
areaIT.securityText: Secure methods for payment, delivery and disposal

areaOffice.title: Office Supplies
areaOffice.subtitle: Office Supplies
areaOffice.text: We market a wide range of consumables and offer turnkey solutions for outfitting office rooms.

areaOfficeMob.title: Office Furniture
areaOfficeMob.subtitle: Office Furniture
areaOfficeMob.text: Complete solutions for corporate spaces, focusing on ergonomics, functionality and design.
areaOfficeMob.furnitureSupplyText: Desks, chairs, cabinets and workstations with modern design and durable materials.
areaOfficeMob.customProjectsText: Layouts adapted to the available space, promoting comfort, productivity and smart use.

instalacoes.officeDesc: Modern and equipped spaces for your office.
